description: AI模型调用全景监控看板 - 覆盖请求量、Token消耗、响应延迟、错误分析等维度，支持按模型/应用/用户多维下钻

spec.expr: sum(increase(ai_model_requests_total{status="success", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum(increase(ai_model_requests_total{status="started", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range])), 1) * 100

(sum by (model_name) (rate(ai_model_response_duration_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (model_name) (rate(ai_model_response_duration_seconds_count{model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)) * 1000

spec.title: 平均响应时间趋势（按模型）

spec.expr: sum by (model_name, token_type) (rate(ai_model_tokens_total{token_type!="total", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__rate_interval]))

(sum by (model_name) (increase(ai_model_response_duration_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum by (model_name) (increase(ai_model_response_duration_seconds_count{model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range])), 1)) * 1000
sum by (model_name, token_type) (increase(ai_model_tokens_total{token_type!="total", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range]))

spec.title: 各模型Token消耗对比（分组柱状）

spec.expr: topk(10, floor(sum by (app_id) (increase(ai_model_requests_total{status="success", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range]))))

spec.title: 热门应用排行（调用次数）

spec.expr: topk(10, floor(sum by (user_id) (increase(ai_model_requests_total{status="success", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range]))))

spec.title: 用户活跃排行（调用次数）

spec.expr: topk(10, sum by (app_id) (increase(ai_model_tokens_total{token_type="total", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range])))
topk(10, sum by (user_id) (increase(ai_model_tokens_total{token_type="total", model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range])))
topk(10, floor(sum by (model_name, error_message) (increase(ai_model_errors_total{model_name=~"$model", app_id=~"$app", user_id=~"$user"}[$__range]))))

title: AI模型监控看板
